    pyudev.pyqt4
    ============
    PyQt4 integration.
    :class:`MonitorObserver` integrates device monitoring into the PyQt4\_
    mainloop by turning device events into Qt signals.
    :mod:`PyQt4.QtCore` from PyQt4\_ must be available when importing this
    module.
    .. _PyQt4: http://riverbankcomputing.co.uk/software/pyqt/intro
    .. moduleauthor::  Sebastian Wiesner  <lunaryorn@gmail.com>
QtCore
MonitorObserverGenerator
QUDevMonitorObserverGeneratorN)
__doc__Z
PyQt4r
_qt_baser
make_monitor_observerZ
QObjectZ
pyqtSignalZ
QSocketNotifierZ
MonitorObserverZ
QUDevMonitorObserver
0/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pyudev/pyqt4.py
